name: GitHub Actions: build Vite app
description: CI workflow that installs deps, typechecks, and builds a Vite project on push and PR.

files.content:
name: CI

on:
  push:
    branches: [main]
  pull_request:

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: 20
          cache: npm
      - run: npm ci
      - run: npm run typecheck --if-present
      - run: npm run build
